items.summary: If you are wondering whether AbbVie at around US$227.73 is still offering fair value, the starting point is to understand what the current price actually reflects. items.headline: Why a Dividend Portfolio That Pays Your Rent May Beat Homeownership by $500,000 Over 20 Years
items.summary: Paying $2,000 a month in rent is often described as throwing money away. Homeownership, by contrast, is treated as the only reliable path to wealth. Yet under the right conditions, a dividend portfolio large enough to cover your rent can leave you with greater flexibility and, in some cases, a larger net worth than owning ... items.headline: What Could Push JNJ Stock Higher From Here?
items.summary: While the market fixates on the STELARA patent cliff, the rest of the business is quietly accelerating. Excluding the legacy drug, Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) grew in double digits for the quarter. The Innovative Medicine segment absorbed a massive 920 basis point headwind from STELARA, yet still posted 7.4% growth. This is not a company treading water, but a portfolio already hitting its next stride.
